zh.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Seyton於1332年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾。她於1352年與Sir Thomas Reynes of Clifton Reynes結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世在英國巴金哈姆爾克里夫頓 雷恩斯，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Seyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deighton
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Durham): habitational name from any of several places in Yorkshire named Deighton, from Old English dīc ‘ditch, dike’ + tūn ‘settlement, enclosure’. See also Ditton .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Seyton was born in 1332, in Northamptonshire, England. She married Sir Thomas Reynes of Clifton Reynes in 1352. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in Clifton Reynes, Buckinghamshire, England, and was buried in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Seyton est née en 1332, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Reynes of Clifton Reynes en 1352. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée à Clifton Reynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Seytonは1332年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた。1352年にSir Thomas Reynes of Clifton Reynesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女はイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクリフトン レインスで死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Seyton(은)는 1332년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1352년 Sir Thomas Reynes of Clifton Reynes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 벅잉함실르 클리프턴 리인스에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Joan de Seyton родилась в 1332 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Reynes of Clifton Reynes в 1352 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в местности клифтон ринесь, буккингхамшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
